name: Code Quality Rubric
description: Evaluates fix quality for correctness, readability, and completeness

criteria.name: Null Safety
criteria.description: Fix guards against null/None dereferences before attribute access

criteria.name: Readability
criteria.description: Fix is readable, follows Python idioms, and is properly formatted

criteria.name: Completeness
criteria.description: Fix addresses all bugs reported in the analysis output
